ASPECTSCOLORLESS-CYCLE.title: Cycle
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-CYCLE.description: When you play this card, its cost permanently increases by 1. If it exceeds its original cost, it resets to 0.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-LASTRESORT.title: Last Resort
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-LASTRESORT.description: When shuffled, this card is always placed at the bottom of the draw pile.
